profile.name: Atul Patil
profile.coverLetter: QA Lead with ~3 years of experience in automation (Java, Selenium, TestNG, Maven), API testing (Postman, Rest Assured), and CI/CD (Jenkins). Experienced in validating GenAI features and leading cross-functional QA initiatives. I look forward to contributing to your team's testing maturity and release quality.
profile.summary: Leading QA at Chat360; designed automation frameworks (Java+Selenium+TestNG), ran API testing (Postman/Rest Assured), integrated tests in Jenkins CI/CD; improved efficiency and reduced regression cycles.

qaAnswers.name: Atul Patil
qaAnswers.previousRoles: Software Tester at MiM-Essay (May 2022 – Jan 2025); Java Developer Intern at Oasis Infobyte (Mar 2022 – May 2022); Web Development Intern at The Spark Foundation Network (Dec 2021 – Jan 2022).
qaAnswers.responsibilities: Leading QA ownership for Chat360, designing automation frameworks (Java + Selenium + TestNG + Maven), API testing with Postman and Rest Assured, GenAI validation, cross-functional collaboration.
qaAnswers.languages: Java, C#, Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, SQL
qaAnswers.tools: Selenium, TestNG, Maven, Playwright, Ui-Licious, Jenkins, Postman, Rest Assured
qaAnswers.cicd: Yes — integrated automation with Jenkins CI/CD and set up nightly/regression pipelines.
qaAnswers.apiTesting: Extensive — API testing using Postman and Rest Assured, validated REST endpoints, integrated tests into automation suites.
qaAnswers.frameworks: Designed and implemented a data-driven test automation framework using Java, Selenium WebDriver, TestNG, Maven with POM, Singleton, and Page Factory patterns.
qaAnswers.improvements: Improved testing efficiency by ~30% and reduced execution time by ~25% in previous roles.
qaAnswers.genai: Yes — spearheaded GenAI feature validation (prompt-response integrity, intent recognition, fallback accuracy, multilingual inputs) for Chat360.
qaAnswers.relocation: Open to both — comfortable with WFH or relocation depending on role and company policy.
qaAnswers.education: Master of Computer Application (MCA) — Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University (Aug 2021 – Oct 2023).
qaAnswers.undergraduate: Bachelor of Computer Science (B.Sc) — North Maharashtra University (Aug 2016 – July 2020).
qaAnswers.awards: Received the Release Shield Award for ensuring quality and stability in production releases; led setup of a Selenium + TestNG automation framework integrated with Jenkins.
qaAnswers.whyRole: I want to leverage my 3 years of QA and automation experience to improve product quality and accelerate releases. I enjoy building automation frameworks and validating complex features including GenAI. I am excited to contribute to your team's testing maturity and CI/CD practices.
qaAnswers.strengths: Strong automation framework design (POM, Singleton), API testing expertise, CI/CD integration experience, and leadership in QA processes.
qaAnswers.weaknesses: I focus on technical depth; sometimes I invest extra time perfecting automation — I am improving by prioritizing business impact and timelines.
qaAnswers.selenium: Yes — practical experience with Selenium and Playwright; used Selenium + TestNG + Maven extensively.
qaAnswers.testng: Yes — used TestNG for test orchestration and parallel test execution; used design patterns to stabilize frameworks.
qaAnswers.sql: Familiar with SQL and database validation as part of end-to-end test cases.
qaAnswers.restAssured: Yes — performed API validation and integrated tests into automation suites.
qaAnswers.shortSummary: QA Lead with ~3 years experience in automation (Java, Selenium, TestNG, Maven), API testing (Postman, Rest Assured), and CI/CD (Jenkins); experienced in validating GenAI features and leading cross-functional QA initiatives.
